Clamp a number to the inclusive interval from low to high.
buggy_code:
def clamp_train(value, low, high):
    return min(low, max(value, high))
reference_solution:
def clamp_train(value, low, high):
    return max(low, min(value, high))

description: Clamp a number to the inclusive interval from low to high.
buggy_code:
def clamp_test(value, low, high):
    return min(low, max(value, high))
reference_solution:
def clamp_test(value, low, high):
    return max(low, min(value, high))

description: Clamp a number to the inclusive interval from low to high.
buggy_code:
def clamp_shifted_test(value, low, high):
    return min(low, max(value, high))
reference_solution:
def clamp_shifted_test(value, low, high):
    return max(low, min(value, high))

Count vowels in a string regardless of letter case.
buggy_code:
def count_vowels_train(text):
    return sum(char in 'aeiou' for char in text)
reference_solution:
def count_vowels_train(text):
    return sum(char in 'aeiou' for char in text.lower())

description: Count vowels in a string regardless of letter case.
buggy_code:
def count_vowels_test(text):
    return sum(char in 'aeiou' for char in text)
reference_solution:
def count_vowels_test(text):
    return sum(char in 'aeiou' for char in text.lower())

description: Count vowels in a string regardless of letter case.
buggy_code:
def count_vowels_shifted_test(text):
    return sum(char in 'aeiou' for char in text)
reference_solution:
def count_vowels_shifted_test(text):
    return sum(char in 'aeiou' for char in text.lower())

description: Normalize whitespace by trimming and joining words with single spaces.
buggy_code:
def normalize_spaces_train(text):
    return text.replace(' ', '')
reference_solution:
def normalize_spaces_train(text):
    return ' '.join(text.split())

description: Normalize whitespace by trimming and joining words with single spaces.
buggy_code:
def normalize_spaces_test(text):
    return text.replace(' ', '')
reference_solution:
def normalize_spaces_test(text):
    return ' '.join(text.split())

description: Normalize whitespace by trimming and joining words with single spaces.
buggy_code:
def normalize_spaces_shifted_test(text):
    return text.replace(' ', '')
reference_solution:
def normalize_spaces_shifted_test(text):
    return ' '.join(text.split())
